attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 XEXT.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_XAAS_KEY AS OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY
,'XAAS' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,XEXT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,XEXT.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,XEXT.SK_TRX_ID_INT
,XEXT.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,XEXT.SALES_MOTION_CD
,XEXT.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
,XEXT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,XEXT.PRODUCT_KEY
,XEXT.DV_TOP_SKU_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,XEXT.DV_TOPSKU_SOSBR_ITM_SLSTRX_KEY AS DV_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY
,XEXT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,XEXT.TRANSACTION_BKG_VERSION_INT
,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,XEXT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,XEXT.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,XEXT.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
,XEXT.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT) AS LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,XEXT.START_TV_DTM
,XEXT.END_TV_DTM
,XEXT.EDW_CREATE_DTM
,XEXT.EDW_CREATE_USER
,XEXT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,XEXT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,CASE WHEN (MTEXT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY IS NULL AND MTEXT.START_TV_DTM IS NULL )THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE              
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_TV XEXT
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(SELECT OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY,START_TV_DTM FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION  WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS' GROUP BY 1,2 )MTEXT
ON XEXT.OFFER_ATTRIB_ACV_RTNR_XAAS_KEY=MTEXT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY
AND XEXT.START_TV_DTM=MTEXT.START_TV_DTM
WHERE XEXT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >=(SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID  = 'wf_MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_XAAS')

SELECT 
 WORA.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY       
,WORA.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,WORA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WORA.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
,WORA.SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
,WORA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WORA.SALES_MOTION_CD               
,WORA.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY                  
,WORA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
,WORA.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WORA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WORA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,WORA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WORA.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,WORA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
,WORA.TRANSACTION_BKG_VERSION_INT   
,WORA.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WORA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WORA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WORA.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME         
,WORA.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
,WORA.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
,WORA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
,WORA.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WORA.START_TV_DTM
,WORA.END_TV_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM              
$$WORKDB.W_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION WORA
WHERE DML_TYPE='I' AND WORA.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS'
AND NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION NXSSIST 
WHERE NXSSIST.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY=WORA.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY 
AND   NXSSIST.START_TV_DTM= WORA.START_TV_DTM 
AND   NXSSIST.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS' 
)
